# Figure description: IV.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Список_приложений/IV.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **document inventory table** (описание чертежей / drawing register), specifically the final page (page IV) of a numbered list of graphical materials (drawings/figures) accompanying a geological report. It is not a geological figure itself, but rather an administrative inventory cataloguing the drawings submitted with the report.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The table covers the final entries in a register of geological drawings, numbered **58 through 62**. All entries relate to **geological cross-sections (геологические разрезы) by borehole (скважина)**, specifically:

- **Drawing 58** — Geological cross-section along borehole **№ 135**
- **Drawing 59** — Cross-section along borehole **№ 136**, plus conditional symbols (legend) for columns **№ 114–139**
- **Drawing 60** — Cross-section along borehole **№ 137**
- **Drawing 61** — Cross-section along borehole **№ 138**
- **Drawing 62** — Cross-section along borehole **№ 139**

These are boreholes in the series 114–139, consistent with a drilling programme described in the broader regional survey.

---

## Key Content

The table has **7 columns**, with the following structure (headers: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7):

| Col | Content |
|-----|---------|
| 1 | Sequential number of the drawing (58–62) |
| 2 | Duplicate number (same as col. 1) |
| 3 | Title/description of the drawing |
| 4 | Scale — all entries: **1:200** |
| 5 | Copy number — all entries: **I** (first/original copy) |
| 6 | Security classification — all entries: **не секретно** (not secret/unclassified) |
| 7 | Paper type — all entries: **светочувствительная** (photosensitive/blueprint paper) |

All drawings share identical attributes: scale 1:200, single copy, unclassified, printed on photosensitive paper. The repeated ditto marks (—"—) confirm uniformity across all five entries.

A handwritten note at the bottom states:

> **Всего 62 чертежа на 76 листах**

Meaning: *"Total: 62 drawings on 76 sheets"* — indicating the complete graphical archive of the report consists of 62 numbered drawings distributed across 76 physical sheets (some drawings spanning multiple sheets).

A **circular official stamp** is affixed, partially legible, referencing a state geological oversight body (likely **Центральная геологическая экспедиция** or similar Soviet geological authority), with a signature beneath it.

Checkmarks (√) appear beside entries 58, 59, 60, 61, and 62 in column 1, indicating these drawings were verified or submitted.

## Research Value

This inventory page confirms that the report contains **62 geological drawings on 76 sheets**, with drawings 58–62 being borehole geological cross-sections at 1:200 scale for boreholes 135–139, and that drawing 59 also includes the master legend (условные обозначения) for the entire borehole column series 114–139. For a research assistant, this page is essential for **locating and cross-referencing specific borehole logs** within the archive — knowing that the legend for all borehole columns is embedded in drawing 59 is particularly important for interpreting the lithological and stratigraphic data across the drilling programme. It also confirms the complete scope of the graphical dataset and its unclassified status, facilitating full access to the subsurface structural and mineralogical data.
